commands.name: $(run-all) Run All
commands.command: bash -lc 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/front-end" && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 & cd "${workspaceFolder}/back-end" && npm run dev & sleep 6; for u in http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5000/api-docs; do if [ -n "$BROWSER" ]; then "$BROWSER" "$u" || xdg-open "$u" || true; else xdg-open "$u" || true; fi; done; wait'

commands.name: $(play) Frontend
commands.command: bash -lc 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/front-end" && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 & sleep 4; if [ -n "$BROWSER" ]; then "$BROWSER" http://localhost:5173 || xdg-open http://localhost:5173 || true; else xdg-open http://localhost:5173 || true; fi; wait'

commands.name: $(play) Backend
commands.command: bash -lc 'cd "${workspaceFolder}/back-end" && npm run dev & sleep 4; if [ -n "$BROWSER" ]; then "$BROWSER" http://localhost:5000/api-docs || xdg-open http://localhost:5000/api-docs || true; else xdg-open http://localhost:5000/api-docs || true; fi; wait'

commands.name: $(package) Build All
commands.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/front-end && npm run build && cd ${workspaceFolder}/back-end && npm run build
